name: Byredo
desc: Stockholm-born house blending modern contrasts — citrus, incense, and woods — into wearable, conceptual perfumes. Founded by Ben Gorham, a native Swede born to an Indian mother and a Canadian father. Byredo focuses on translating memories and emotions into products and experiences.

name: Fueguia 1833
desc: Buenos Aires-based house crafting botanical perfumes inspired by South American landscapes, using natural materials and minimal note pyramids.

name: Xinú
desc: Mexican perfume house focused on botanical ingredients native to the Americas, highlighting indigenous resins, woods, and plants.

name: Diptyque
desc: Parisian house blending French perfumery with travel memories, natural materials, and artistic storytelling since 1961.

name: D.S. & Durga
desc: Brooklyn perfume house known for storytelling fragrances inspired by music, landscapes, and Americana.

name: Le Labo
desc: New York house creating hand-blended perfumes centred on a single star ingredient, paired with raw woods, musks, and spices.

name: Aesop
desc: Australian brand with a botanical philosophy, blending woods, herbs, and resins with quiet, intellectual elegance.

name: Tom Ford
desc: Bold, luxurious fragrances blending Eastern and Western references with theatrical opulence.

name: Replica
desc: Maison Margiela's memory-evoking fragrance line, recreating specific moments and places.

name: Chanel
desc: Iconic French fashion house renowned for timeless elegance and revolutionary, signature aldehydes and florals.

name: Dior
desc: Prestigious Parisian house blending classic luxury with modern sophistication, famous for both bold and delicate floral compositions.

name: Loewe
desc: Spanish luxury house crafting artistic, nature-inspired fragrances with botanical purity and modern minimalism.
